Grammar

    0 $accept: S $end

    1 S: "a" A "a"
    2  | "a" "a" "b"
    3  | "b" A "b"

    4 A: B C

    5 B: "a"

    6 C: D

    7 D: ε


Terminals, with rules where they appear

    $end (0) 0
    error (256)
    "a" (258) 1 2 5
    "b" (259) 2 3


Nonterminals, with rules where they appear

    $accept (5)
        on left: 0
    S (6)
        on left: 1 2 3
        on right: 0
    A (7)
        on left: 4
        on right: 1 3
    B (8)
        on left: 5
        on right: 4
    C (9)
        on left: 6
        on right: 4
    D (10)
        on left: 7
        on right: 6


State 0

    0 $accept: • S $end

    "a"  shift, and go to state 1
    "b"  shift, and go to state 2

    S  go to state 3


State 1

    1 S: "a" • A "a"
    2  | "a" • "a" "b"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 4

    A  go to state 5
    B  go to state 6


State 2

    3 S: "b" • A "b"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 7

    A  go to state 8
    B  go to state 6


State 3

    0 $accept: S • $end

    $end  shift, and go to state 9


State 4

    2 S: "a" "a" • "b"
    5 B: "a" •

    "b"  shift, and go to state 10

    $default  reduce using rule 5 (B)


State 5

    1 S: "a" A • "a"

    "a"  shift, and go to state 11


State 6

    4 A: B • C

    $default  reduce using rule 7 (D)

    C  go to state 12
    D  go to state 13


State 7

    5 B: "a" •

    $default  reduce using rule 5 (B)


State 8

    3 S: "b" A • "b"

    "b"  shift, and go to state 14


State 9

    0 $accept: S $end •

    $default  accept


State 10

    2 S: "a" "a" "b" •

    $default  reduce using rule 2 (S)


State 11

    1 S: "a" A "a" •

    $default  reduce using rule 1 (S)


State 12

    4 A: B C •

    $default  reduce using rule 4 (A)


State 13

    6 C: D •

    $default  reduce using rule 6 (C)


State 14

    3 S: "b" A "b" •

    $default  reduce using rule 3 (S)
